title: Computime Group
description: ***.com ***.com/c/computime-group-ltd/9208093 Computime is a global electronics engineering and manufacturing partner that has been pioneering intelligent control solutions since 1974. Delivering end-to-end services from initial concept to final delivery, the company specializes in designing advanced electronic controls for the appliance, HVAC, smart home, and medical industries. With a strong commitment to innovation, Computime empowers brands worldwide with cutting-edge technology that enables smarter and more sustainable living
